user_message: How should I coach David Chen on Evergreen Solutions? I met with them last week but can't remember the details.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-18 15:39 EST
Subject: URGENT: partner engagement Issue at Evergreen Solutions

There's been a change in our timeline for partner engagement. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
Date: 2024-02-01 17:10 EST
Subject: Follow-up: partner engagement Review

Just checking in on the partner engagement proposal. Our IT Director is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-10 14:47 EST
Subject: Re: partner engagement Discussion - Next Steps

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about partner engagement. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: partner engagement Discussion - Evergreen Solutions
Date: 2024-02-05
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Samantha Okafor (Evergreen Solutions), David Chen (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Samantha Okafor (Evergreen Solutions): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on partner engagement from our last session.

[00:08:00] David Chen (Microsoft): The timeline for integration complexity is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:11:00] Samantha Okafor (Evergreen Solutions): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about data residency. Can we address those?

[00:14:00] David Chen (Microsoft): The timeline for stakeholder alignment is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:18:00] David Chen (Microsoft): The timeline for data residency is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:23:00] David Chen (Microsoft): The timeline for performance requirements is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:28:00] Samantha Okafor (Evergreen Solutions): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is technical validation.

[00:33:00] Samantha Okafor (Evergreen Solutions): On the partner engagement front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around integration complexity.
